Oracle 23ai Help Center

Your AI-Native
Database Guide

Comprehensive technical support, tutorials, and insights for Oracle Database 23ai � the first AI-native database from Oracle.

Browse Support Read the Blog
oracle23ai � sqlplus
-- Oracle Database 23ai
-- AI Vector Search Example
 
SQL> CREATE TABLE docs (
   id      NUMBER,
   content CLOB,
   embed    VECTOR (1536)
);
 
Table created.
 
SQL> SELECT id, VECTOR_DISTANCE
     (embed, :query_vec)
     FROM docs
     ORDER BY 2 FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY;
 
SQL>
All Systems Operational

Vector Search & VECTOR Data Type

Security
Schema Privileges & Least Privilege Access
Oracle 23ai introduces schema-level privileges, simplifying access control. Learn how to migrate from object-level grants and enforce least privilege.
Updated 11 min read
??
Performance
SQL Analysis Report & Optimizer
Use the new SQL Analysis Report to identify anti-patterns, implicit conversions, and Cartesian joins during development � not production.
New in 23ai 14 min read
Featured Guide

Building a RAG Application with Oracle 23ai Vector Search

This comprehensive guide walks you through creating a full retrieval-augmented generation pipeline � from ingesting documents and generating embeddings, to running semantic queries and integrating with LLM APIs using Oracle's native VECTOR type.

Read Full Guide ?
Frequently Asked Questions
What is Oracle Database 23ai? +
Oracle Database 23ai is Oracle's latest long-term support release, designed from the ground up for AI workloads. It includes native VECTOR data types, AI Functions (DBMS_VECTOR), and deep integration with machine learning pipelines � all within the same trusted relational engine.
Is Oracle 23ai free to use? +
Yes. Oracle offers a free edition of 23ai (Oracle Database Free) with limits of 2 CPUs, 2GB RAM, and 12GB user data. It's free for development and testing without requiring an Oracle license.
How does VECTOR_DISTANCE work? +
VECTOR_DISTANCE is a built-in SQL function that computes similarity between two VECTOR values. It supports cosine, dot product, Euclidean, Manhattan, and Hamming metrics. Use it in ORDER BY to find the nearest neighbors to a query embedding.
Can I migrate from Oracle 19c to 23ai? +
Yes. Oracle supports direct upgrade paths from 19c to 23ai using DBUA, manual upgrade scripts, or Data Pump export/import. Review the Pre-Upgrade Information Tool (preupgrade.jar) output and address all warnings before proceeding.

Deep Dive
Oracle 23ai: Everything You Need to Know About the VECTOR Data Type

The VECTOR data type is Oracle's most significant new primitive in over a decade. In this post, we cover its internals, index types (HNSW vs IVF), quantization options, and real-world performance benchmarks against pgvector and Pinecone.

// Release History

Version Timeline

Current Release � 2024
Oracle 23ai CURRENT

AI-native release featuring native vector storage, AI Functions, JSON Duality Views, and schema-level privileges.

VECTOR type AI Functions JSON Duality Schema Privileges SQL Domains True Cache Property Graph
LTS Release � 2019
Oracle 19c

Long-term support release. Stable, widely deployed, supported through extended support.

Automatic Indexing Real-Time Stats JSON Enhancement Multitenant
LTS Release � 2017
Oracle 18c / 12c
Multitenant CDB In-Memory Approximate Query
23ai Key Numbers
3000+
New Features
8
Vector Dimensions
5
Distance Metrics
Free
Developer Edition
Oracle 23ai is the first Oracle Database release with AI as a core architectural principle � not a bolt-on. Vector storage and search are first-class citizens handled entirely within SQL.
